---
title: "Lecture 6: Factors, More `dplyr`"
date: 2025-07-15
summary: "<strong>Using Factors in R, Deep Dive into `dplyr`</strong>"
url_slides: 06-slides.qmd
url_code: https://github.com/brinsab/csp-materials/06-factors-dplyr
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}

**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Before Class

## Readings
